final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: brand-guideline
Asset type: brand color + typography specification sheet
Primary request: brand identity guideline display for "染秋 (RAN QIU)" autumn fragrance brand
Scene/backdrop: clean minimalist layout with color swatches and typography hierarchy
Subject: primary color (#C4A35A golden amber), secondary color (#8B4513 warm brown), accent color (#D2691E persimmon), typography specimens showing Chinese and Latin letterforms
Style/medium: flat design, editorial layout, brand identity presentation
Composition/framing: top-down grid layout, generous white space, organized hierarchy
Lighting/mood: soft diffused, warm and refined, autumn-inspired elegance
Color palette: golden amber (#C4A35A), warm brown (#8B4513), persimmon orange (#D2691E), cream white background, subtle gray text
Materials/textures: matte paper texture, clean vector graphics
Text (verbatim): "染秋 RAN QIU"
Constraints: must display primary color, secondary color, and typography specifications clearly; preserve Chinese characters "染秋" and pinyin "RAN QIU"
Avoid: cluttered layout, neon colors, cold blue tones, decorative elements unrelated to autumn theme
